name: Cherry Street Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Cherry Street Tennis Courts in Falls Church, VA! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.
fees: Members only — Reserved for City of Falls Church residents only

name: Falls Church Senior Center
description: Come play pickleball at Falls Church Senior Center in Falls Church, VA! There are 4 wood courts. 1 is outdoors and 3 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: James Lee Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at James Lee Community Center in Falls Church, VA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and water. The courts are free.

name: Lakeside Plaza Condominium
description: Lakeside Plaza Condominium is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Falls Church, VA. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. Reservations are not available.
fees: Private — Only people that live in the building have access.

name: Meridian High School
description: Meridian High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Falls Church, VA. There are 12 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and lights. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: To make reservation you must live in the city of Falls Church. But without reservation just show up.

name: Roundtree Park
description: Roundtree Park is a place to play pickleball in Falls Church, VA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Westgate Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Westgate Elementary School in Falls Church, VA! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved. The facility includes amenities like lights.
